items.title: SWE-bench Verified no longer measures frontier coding capabilities

items.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
items.summary: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are set to face off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of tech’s leading AI startup, OpenAI. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead.

items.title: UAE to Exit OPEC After Nearly 60 Years
